attacking_style: Operates primarily in breakaways rather than aggressive late attacks. Lacks decisive acceleration in final moments despite strong endurance to stay away.
team_tactics: Insufficient data - appears to be given freedom for breakaway opportunities rather than protected as team leader.
terrain_preference: Demonstrates endurance on varied terrain within breakaways, but specific gradient or distance preferences cannot be determined from available data.
vulnerability: Consistently unable to finish off breakaway efforts - lacks explosive power or tactical sharpness in final kilometers against fellow escapees.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist - multiple appearances in long-range escapes during Grand Tours.
Strong diesel engine but weak finishing kick - consecutive second places indicate pattern.
form_trajectory: neutral: consecutive podiums show consistency but inability to convert suggests plateau rather than progression
